item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: What RSA 2026 Revealed About AI Agent Security and Enterprise Risk
item.description: Learn how AI agent security is reshaping the enterprise landscape with insights from industry leaders at RSA Conference 2026.

item.title: Agentic AI: The Star of RSAC 2026
item.description: Agentic AI is revolutionizing cybersecurity; find out how it became central at RSAC 2026 and what that means for professionals.

item.title: DTEX Trust Center
item.description: DTEX Trust Center

item.title: Trusted Access Is Aviation’s Biggest Security Gap
item.description: Aviation insider risk is rising. See how airlines and suppliers can reduce trusted-access threats across critical workflows.

item.title: Insider West 2026: What This Year’s Conversations Reveal About the Future of Insider Risk
item.description: This conference is a place where practitioners speak candidly about what’s actually working and what isn’t, in insider risk programs.

item.title: Foreign Interference Archives
item.description: Investigate how foreign actors exploit insiders and what proactive steps organizations can take to mitigate these threats.

item.title: Privacy and Trust Archives
item.description: Explore the intersection of privacy and security, and how DTEX protects user privacy while detecting insider risks.

item.title: Product Archives
item.description: Stay up to date on DTEX platform features, products, capabilities, updates, and innovations supporting insider risk management.

item.title: Blog
item.description: Read the DTEX Blog for trusted insights on insider risk management, data loss prevention, AI, proactive security, and more.

item.title: Shana Bautista
item.description: Senior Analyst, Coinbase

item.title: Mitch Green
item.description: Security Researcher

item.title: Greg Otto
item.description: Editor in Chief, CyberScoop

item.title: Michael Barnhart
item.description: Nation-State Intelligence, DTEX

item.title: Amanda Gerut
item.description: West Coast Editor, Fortune

item.title: DTEX Ai³ Risk Assistant Archives
item.description: DTEX Ai³ Risk Assistant Archives

item.title: Threat Intelligence Services (i³) Archives
item.description: Explore DTEX i3 threat intelligence insights, expert investigations, & research that help security teams identify insider risks earlier and act decisively.

item.title: Use Cases Archives
item.description: Use Cases Archives

item.title: Insider Risk Management Archives
item.description: Explore insights, trends, and best practices in insider risk management to help security teams detect threats earlier and protect sensitive data.

item.title: AI Security Archives
item.description: Explore AI security insights and best practices to help security teams govern AI use, reduce emerging risks, and strengthen enterprise protection.

item.title: User Activity Monitoring Archives
item.description: Understand how user activity monitoring supports proactive insider risk detection while respecting privacy and compliance.

item.title: Partnerships and Integrations Archives
item.description: News and insights on DTEX’s strategic partnerships that strengthen insider risk capabilities and technology integrations.

item.title: User and Entity Behavior Analytics Archives
item.description: Learn how user and entity behavioral analytics help detect anomalies, prevent data loss, and identify risky insider patterns early.

item.title: Data Loss Prevention Archives
item.description: Insights and strategies on implementing DLP effectively to stop sensitive data from leaving your organization unintentionally or maliciously.

item.title: Why Human and AI Insiders Demand a New Risk Model
item.description: Explore the emerging concept of AI insider risk and how the interplay between humans and AI magnifies enterprise threats.

item.title: Rajan Koo
item.description: As an engineer with over 20 years in insider risk, Rajan Koo is the CTO and head of DTEX’s Insider Investigations & Intelligence (i3) team.

item.title: Mike Studeman
item.description: As one of the nation’s leading national security professionals, Mike Studeman is an esteemed member of the DTEX Advisory Board.

item.title: Phoebe Robertson
item.description: Mike Price is the Chief Revenue Officer at DTEX, overseeing global revenue operations.

item.title: David Hahn
item.description: CISO Leader David Hahn Joins DTEX’s Advisory Board

item.title: Howard Holton
item.description: Mike Price is the Chief Revenue Officer at DTEX, overseeing global revenue operations.
